prompt_text:
### Demographics: 44-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 4 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Major Depressive Disorder
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older brother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~30 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 51.6 kg; Height 165.2 cm; BMI 18.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 120/61 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.6%; 9 months ago 8.9%; 6 months ago 8.4%; 3 months ago 7.9%; current 6.3%), FPG (12 months ago 272mg/dL; 9 months ago 248mg/dL; 6 months ago 200mg/dL; 3 months ago 214mg/dL; current 133mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 50.9kg; 9 months ago 52.8kg; 6 months ago 51.2kg; 3 months ago 52.8kg; current 51.6kg), Height (12 months ago 165.2cm; 9 months ago 165.2cm; 6 months ago 165.2cm; 3 months ago 165.2cm; current 165.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 19.0kg/m²; current 18.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 121mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 120mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 60mmHg; 9 months ago 60mmHg; 6 months ago 61mmHg; 3 months ago 62mmHg; current 61mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 79U/L; 9 months ago 82U/L; 6 months ago 77U/L; 3 months ago 74U/L; current 75U/L), AST (12 months ago 111U/L; 9 months ago 107U/L; 6 months ago 113U/L; 3 months ago 116U/L; current 105U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.4mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.5mg/dL; current 1.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 28mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 25mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 24mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 23mL/min/1.73m²; current 23mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 619mg/g; 9 months ago 628mg/g; 6 months ago 434mg/g; 3 months ago 448mg/g; current 524mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 71mg/dL; 9 months ago 72mg/dL; 6 months ago 75mg/dL; 3 months ago 75mg/dL; current 73mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 39mg/dL; 9 months ago 39mg/dL; 6 months ago 39mg/dL; 3 months ago 43mg/dL; current 41mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 171mg/dL; 9 months ago 157mg/dL; 6 months ago 170mg/dL; 3 months ago 154mg/dL; current 164mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.2g/dL; current 11.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.60 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
